description: Specify edge curve-type. Edge(s) in the current < range > are affected, if supplied; all edges are affected if not.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: arc
keywords.description: Specify an arc edge. An arc can have one control point only.

keywords.name: polyline
keywords.description: Specify a polyline edge (the is the default type ).
